mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TRAFFIC_DEDUCT_DONE ( trace_id, record_id, line_id, family_id, app_id, api_total_data, deducted_total_bytes, api_remaining_data, final_status, last_lua_status, started_at, finished_at, latency, restore_status, restore_status_updated_at, restore_retry_count, restore_last_error_message ) VALUES ( #{traceId}, #{recordId}, #{lineId}, #{familyId}, #{appId}, #{apiTotalData}, #{deductedTotalBytes}, #{apiRemainingData}, #{finalStatus}, #{lastLuaStatus}, #{startedAt}, #{finishedAt}, #{latency}, 'NONE', CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(6), 0, NULL )
